pr.title: feat(deals): commission-via-invoice (P10) + drop Treasury (P5)
pr.body:
## Summary

Completes the combined P5/P10 branch for dropping the platform Treasury accumulator and moving deal commission payment into the deposit-invoice topup flow.

- Backend: removed Treasury models/routes/schemas/tests, dropped per-deal `pay_commission`, added `pending_topup`, `topup_deposit_id`, `commission_paid`, deal-topup deposits, expiry sweep, buyer cancel endpoint, and inlined `topup_invoice` recovery data.
- Frontend: updated manual DTOs/hooks/query keys, switched deal creation to `POST /api/deals/with-topup`, added invoice preview after create, added pending-topup detail banner with pay/cancel actions, removed Treasury admin route/menu/page/hooks, and surfaced `pending_topup_expiry_hours` in admin settings.
- Tests: updated frontend unit/e2e fixtures/contracts for `pending_topup` and removed `pay_commission`/Treasury references; added backend topup scenarios and retuned existing balance assertions for principal-only locks/refunds.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Create a buyer deal via `/deals/new` and confirm the invoice preview shows missing principal, commission, total, and opens the provider pay URL.
- [ ] Reload a `pending_topup` deal detail page and confirm the inlined invoice banner can reopen the invoice and buyer cancellation expires the topup.
- [ ] In admin, confirm the Treasury page/menu are gone and the settings page can view/update `pending_topup_expiry_hours`.
- [ ] Run a provider-paid round trip on staging: create deal with topup → pay invoice → verify transition to seller confirmation and correct buyer/seller balances.

### Notes

Local verification run:

- `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- `cd frontend && npm run typecheck`
- `cd frontend && npm run test:run` — 497 passed
- `cd frontend && npm run build`
- `FRONTEND_DIST_DIR=/nonexistent python -m pytest tests/ --no-cov` — 748 passed

`python -m pytest tests/ --no-cov` without `FRONTEND_DIST_DIR=/nonexistent` fails after a local frontend build because the built SPA fallback turns `GET /api/auth/whoami` into `200` in `test_v5_c_3_get_under_api_auth_still_passes_via_readonly`; with frontend dist disabled it passes.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/fb59eadf8fdd479aba8712711a0c32aa
Requested by: @g2void2-byte
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
